## What changed
<!-- 1-3 sentences. Focus on the *why* — the *what* is in the diff. -->

## Type of change
- [ ] New feature (`feat`)
- [ ] Bug fix (`fix`)
- [ ] Refactor (no behavior change) (`refactor`)
- [ ] Performance (`perf`)
- [ ] Tests (`test`)
- [ ] Docs / context (`docs`)
- [ ] Build / CI / chore (`build` / `ci` / `chore`)
- [ ] Breaking change (`feat!:` / `fix!:`)

## Checklist
- [ ] Conventional Commits message used (`<type>(<scope>): <subject>`)
- [ ] Tests added or updated; all pass locally
- [ ] No secrets, tokens, or PII added to the repo
- [ ] `CLAUDE.md` / `.claude/context/` updated if behavior or architecture changed
- [ ] `README.md` updated if user-facing surface changed
- [ ] `SECURITY.md` reviewed if this PR touches auth, secrets, or agent/tool code
- [ ] No commented-out code or `print` debug residue
